info.name: Predictly API - Hybrid Market System
info.description: Prediction Market with Wallet Authentication & Hybrid On-Chain/Off-Chain System

request.description: Check if the API server is running

exec: // Save the message as a JSON-escaped string
console.log('⚠️  IMPORTANT: Copy the message above and sign it with your wallet.');
console.log('Then paste the signature in the next request.');

request.description: Generate a message to be signed by the user's wallet. The nonce expires after 5 minutes.

exec: // ⚠️  PENTING: Postman tidak bisa sign Ed25519 secara native.
// Gunakan salah satu cara berikut untuk mendapatkan signature:
//   → Copy token langsung ke collection variable 'token'
//   → Tidak perlu jalankan request ini sama sekali!
//   → Copy nilai signature, publicKey dari output
//   → Pastikan message di body = nilai dari step 1 (bukan {{signInMessage}})
//   → Connect wallet → Get Message → Sign & Verify
//   signature : hex string 128 chars (64 bytes Ed25519), tanpa 0x prefix
//   publicKey : hex string 64 chars (32 bytes), tanpa 0x prefix
//   message   : string PERSIS sama dengan yang diterima dari step 1
// JANGAN kirim signature sebagai plain text atau base64!
console.log('⚠️  Pastikan signature & publicKey sudah di-set dari script helper.');
console.log('💡 FIX: Signature harus 64 bytes (128 hex chars).');

request.description:
Verify the signed message and authenticate the user.

⚠️  PENTING: Postman tidak bisa sign Ed25519 secara native.

✅ CARA TERMUDAH:
  1. Jalankan di terminal:
     cd backend
     node scripts/generate-postman-token.js
  2. Copy token dari output langsung ke collection variable 'token'
  3. Tidak perlu jalankan request ini!

📋 CARA MANUAL (jika ingin test flow lengkap):
  1. Jalankan step 1 (Get Sign-In Message) → message tersimpan di {{signInMessage}}
  2. Jalankan: node scripts/test-wallet-auth.js
  3. Copy nilai 'Signature' dan 'Public Key' dari output
  4. Set ke collection variables:
     - signature = nilai hex signature (128 chars, tanpa 0x)
     - publicKey = nilai hex public key (64 chars, tanpa 0x)
  5. Jalankan request ini

❌ ERROR 'Invalid signature format. Expected 64 bytes':
   Artinya signature yang dikirim bukan format hex Ed25519 yang benar.
   Gunakan script helper di atas untuk generate signature yang valid.
Get the authenticated user's profile

request.description:
Step 2: Place a vote (deposit MOVE tokens) on a prediction market.

🐛 BUG FIX VERIFICATION:
- BEFORE fix: Returns 201 success but onChainTxHash is NULL — tokens NOT deducted
- AFTER fix: Returns 201 success with onChainTxHash SET — tokens ARE deducted on-chain

Prerequisites:
- {{token}} must be set (run Wallet Authentication first)
- {{marketId}} must be set to an ACTIVE market with onChainId
- Market must be initialized on-chain (run Markets > Initialize Market first)
- User must be a group member
- User must not have voted on this market yet

exec: var beforeVal = typeof before === 'object' ? (before.move || before.balance || before) : before;
var afterVal = typeof balanceAfter === 'object' ? (balanceAfter.move || balanceAfter.balance || balanceAfter) : balanceAfter;
console.log('✅ BUG FIXED: Balance DECREASED from', beforeVal, 'to', afterVal);
console.log('   Tokens were successfully deducted on-chain!');
console.log('❌ BUG STILL PRESENT: Balance did NOT decrease');

✅ Expected (after fix): Balance should be LOWER than before the vote by the voted amount.
❌ Bug behavior: Balance stays the same as before.

request.description:

Replace the market ID in the URL with a market that has NOT been initialized on-chain (onChainId is null).

item.name: 6. Test Error - On-Chain Failure Returns 500 (No DB Write)

exec: console.log('ℹ️  This test simulates on-chain failure.');
console.log('   In production, if the contract call fails,');
console.log('   the vote should NOT be saved to the database.');
console.log('   Check DB to confirm no vote row was created.');

request.description:
Step 6: Test on-chain failure scenario by using an absurdly large amount that will be rejected by the contract.

✅ Expected after fix: Returns 500 'Failed to submit on-chain transaction' AND no vote row is created in DB
❌ Bug behavior: Would have returned 201 and created a DB row even without on-chain tx

item.description:
🐛 Bug Fix Testing: User deposit MOVE token untuk memulai prediction

Bug: Balance tidak berkurang setelah vote berhasil (onChainTxHash = null)
Fix: placeVoteOnChain() dipanggil sebelum DB write, DB write di-gate pada konfirmasi on-chain

Test Flow:
1. Check balance before vote
2. Place vote → verify onChainTxHash is SET
3. Check balance after vote → verify balance DECREASED
4. Verify all votes have onChainTxHash in DB
5. Test error: market not on-chain → 400
6. Test error: on-chain failure → 500, no DB write
